name: Riki School Bus
districts_or_customers: Likely Miami-Dade County Public Schools area private school bus contractor (Hialeah)
recent_news: No public M&A or press coverage found; appears to be a micro single-bus operator in Hialeah, FL since ~2018.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (1 bus, ~$89K rev, 2 employees) Hialeah micro-operator; not material as a stand-alone tuck-in for Summit. Could be a roll-up component only as part of a broader Miami-Dade Hispanic micro-operator consolidation play.

name: Santa Fe School Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: Historically Miami-Dade area private bus contracting (Hialeah)
recent_news: Florida Sunbiz record shows Santa Fe School Bus Inc was administratively dissolved for failure to file annual report (last event ~09/2016). USDOT 2784287 historically listed in Hialeah, FL. Entity status as an operating company is doubtful as of 2025-2026.
fit_notes: Likely defunct / administratively dissolved entity. Not a viable Summit tuck-in target; flag for removal from active prospect list.

name: Sofia School Trnsprtn LLC

recent_news: No public press, M&A activity, or notable news found. Sunbiz returns related but distinct entities (Sofia Transport LLC, Ramirez Transportation LLC, RMR School Transportation LLC) — none confirmed as this exact entity.
fit_notes: Single-owner micro-operator (~$89K rev, 2 employees, ~1 bus) in Miami; below Summit tuck-in scale on its own. Possible roll-up component only.
